case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SILVANO VILLAREAL REYES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED FEB-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, SILVANO VILLAREAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYES, SILVANO VILLAREAL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00, ON DELINQUENT LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, SILVANO VILLAREAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
